### Airbyte's ChatGPT Button Feature

  - [Dave highlighted Airbyte's "Summarize with ChatGPT" button](https://fathom.video/share/4zQysQebfLh-XjAV38QBf36nrYv1zUeo?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [Potential benefits:](https://fathom.video/share/4zQysQebfLh-XjAV38QBf36nrYv1zUeo?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [Forces ChatGPT to review the content](https://fathom.video/share/4zQysQebfLh-XjAV38QBf36nrYv1zUeo?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
      - [Adds to ChatGPT's history, potentially increasing future references](https://fathom.video/share/4zQysQebfLh-XjAV38QBf36nrYv1zUeo?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Considerations for testing:](https://fathom.video/share/4zQysQebfLh-XjAV38QBf36nrYv1zUeo?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
      - [Timing of implementation (possibly Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/4zQysQebfLh-XjAV38QBf36nrYv1zUeo?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [Potential to add extra context in the prompt (e.g., article title, company name)](https://fathom.video/share/4zQysQebfLh-XjAV38QBf36nrYv1zUeo?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Custom-built by Airbyte, not an OpenAI embed](https://fathom.video/share/4zQysQebfLh-XjAV38QBf36nrYv1zUeo?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
